data.content: Starting the notification service refactor. I'll look at the current architecture...

data.summary: Refactoring notification service from monolithic mailer to event-driven architecture. Mapped 12 notification types, 4 can be consolidated. Using SQS for async, Redis pub/sub for real-time. Webhook at /api/webhooks/notify.

data.content: The SQS queues are set up. Now let's add the dead letter queue config.

data.summary: SQS queues operational with DLQ configured (maxReceiveCount=3, 14-day retention). Next: Redis pub/sub for real-time and zero-downtime cutover.

kaspiett.main: refactoring notification service to event-driven architecture
